reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.8.3: stage 2 steps 2-3. Adds a working raster paint canvas with brush and eraser tools that write directly to the active layer, a layer panel (add/remove/move/switch), and New Document / Resize Canvas dialogs with size presets. Opened from the AI menu as a preview window so the MS Paint style workflow can be tried before the main canvas is swapped over.
